instructions: Deploy the Docker image via Coolify to paranoia.krulestwo.com. After deployment, verify the health endpoint and that the React SPA is served.
acceptance: GET https://paranoia.krulestwo.com/health returns 200 with JSON containing "ok":true
GET https://paranoia.krulestwo.com/ returns HTML (React SPA index page)
GET https://paranoia.krulestwo.com/nonexistent-route returns HTML (SPA fallback, not 404 from server)
